questionHtml: Outline the possible consequences of a Helicobacter pylori infection of the stomach wall.
markschemeHtml:
a. causes inflammation ✔

b. digestion of stomach lining by pepsin and HCl/gastric juice ✔ 

c. called «gastric» ulcer ✔

meta.title: Outline the possible consequences of a Helicobacter pylori infection of the stomach wall.
